_doc: Level-2 display thresholds for the  mbd-display  Elasticsearch alias.
Edit the values below and run:  python manage_display_filter.py
to push the new filter to Elasticsearch — no data re-ingestion needed.
Each misbehavior type lists the field(s) that must ALL be satisfied for
a record to appear in the filtered Kibana view.  Units are consistent:
km/h  for speeds and speed differences
m     for distances and position jumps
Range conditions use Elasticsearch range syntax:
Multiple conditions on the same field are AND-ed together.
A list of conditions on the same field are OR-ed together, e.g.:
Run  python manage_display_filter.py --show  to inspect the live alias.
